SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.pipeline

Record Class PromptContext

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.orasaka.core.pipeline.PromptContext
Record Components:
rawUserQuery - The original raw user query prompt.
userMetadata - Immutable map containing enriched user attributes and preferences.
systemMetadata - Immutable map containing enriched system and environment signals.
refinedPrompt - The refined instruction text (defaults to rawUserQuery).
routedProvider - The routed model provider key (or null if default).
public record PromptContext(String rawUserQuery, Map<String,Object> userMetadata, Map<String,Object> systemMetadata, String refinedPrompt, String routedProvider) extends Record
State machine context holding user and system matrices for prompt refinement and routing.

Implemented as an immutable Java 21 record in compliance with ADR-008.

    Description

    Compact constructor enforcing immutability and defensive copying.

  • Constructor Details

    • PromptContext

      public PromptContext(String rawUserQuery, Map<String,Object> userMetadata, Map<String,Object> systemMetadata, String refinedPrompt, String routedProvider)
      Compact constructor enforcing immutability and defensive copying.
      Parameters:
      rawUserQuery - The original raw user query prompt.
      userMetadata - Immutable map containing enriched user attributes and preferences.
      systemMetadata - Immutable map containing enriched system and environment signals.
      refinedPrompt - The refined instruction text (defaults to rawUserQuery).
      routedProvider - The routed model provider key (or null if default).

    • PromptContext

      public PromptContext(String rawUserQuery, Map<String,Object> userMetadata)
      Overloaded constructor for initial creation of PromptContext.
      Parameters:
      rawUserQuery - The raw user query prompt.
      userMetadata - Initial user context matrix.

  • Method Details

    • withRefinedPrompt

      public PromptContext withRefinedPrompt(String refinedPrompt)
      Returns a copy of this context with a new refined prompt.
      Parameters:
      refinedPrompt - The refined prompt text.
      Returns:
      A new PromptContext instance.

    • withRoutedProvider

      public PromptContext withRoutedProvider(String routedProvider)
      Returns a copy of this context with a new routed provider.
      Parameters:
      routedProvider - The routed provider key.
      Returns:
      A new PromptContext instance.

    • withUserMetadata

      public PromptContext withUserMetadata(Map<String,Object> userMetadata)
      Returns a copy of this context with a new user metadata map.
      Parameters:
      userMetadata - The new user metadata map.
      Returns:
      A new PromptContext instance.

    • withSystemMetadata

      public PromptContext withSystemMetadata(Map<String,Object> systemMetadata)
      Returns a copy of this context with a new system metadata map.
      Parameters:
      systemMetadata - The new system metadata map.
      Returns:
      A new PromptContext instance.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
